query:
SELECT 
  id,
  status,
  startedAt,
  completedAt,
  ROUND(durationMs / 60000, 1) as durationMins,
  feedsFetched,
  feedErrors,
  articlesIngested,
  articlesExtracted,
  projectsCreated,
  contactsEnriched,
  apolloCreditsUsed
FROM pipelineRuns
ORDER BY startedAt DESC
LIMIT 3;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user HWMKhVWm4R1gayY.38561a93bc5c --database 3SMu786VMCWdCnmNSx6pxw --execute

FROM pipelineRuns
